landing.title: UPGOV
landing.subtitle: Smart Public Service Command Centre
landing.tagline: Uttar Pradesh — from Grievance to Resolution. Transparently.
landing.processTitle: How one grievance moves from citizen filing to accountable resolution
landing.processSub: A short process view keeps the platform self-explanatory without repeating the portal login choices already shown above.
landing.processBadge: Citizen to Routing to Officer to Oversight
landing.aboutText: UPGOV is a public-service grievance platform for Uttar Pradesh that brings complaint intake, departmental routing, field verification, and monitoring into one more legible civic workflow.
landing.footerCredit: Designed and developed by Team Byte Me, JSS University, Noida.

noticeItems.platform: UPGOV unifies citizen grievance filing, department routing, WhatsApp intake, SLA monitoring, and public transparency for Uttar Pradesh.
noticeItems.workflow: Built for faster response, cleaner accountability, and clearer status tracking across citizen, officer, and admin workflows.

trust.title: Official platforms relevant to grievance redressal
trust.subtitle: Only grievance-related and governance-relevant references are shown here, so the trust rail stays compact and purposeful.

pwd.name: Public Works Department
pwd.alt: Public Works Department Uttar Pradesh identity card

file.title: Citizen files the grievance
file.desc: A complaint is submitted through the portal or WhatsApp with issue details, location, and supporting evidence.

route.title: UPGOV classifies and routes it
route.desc: The platform identifies the issue type and places it in the correct departmental queue for action.

verify.title: Officer verifies and updates
verify.desc: Field teams inspect the issue, record progress, and keep the complaint status aligned with ground action.

monitor.title: Admin monitors accountability
monitor.desc: SLA performance, escalation, and public reporting keep the full workflow visible and answerable.

intake.title: Single-window grievance intake
intake.desc: Citizens get one clear route to file complaints and follow case status.

verification.title: Disciplined field verification
verification.desc: Officers work from routed assignments with updates grounded in field checks.

oversight.title: Transparent operational oversight
oversight.desc: Administrative monitoring and public dashboards make resolution performance visible.

citizen.title: Citizen Portal
citizen.desc: File grievances with AI-assistance, track progress, and receive transparent updates.
citizen.b3: Get SMS and WhatsApp updates at every stage
citizen.b4: Rate resolution quality and provide feedback

officer.title: Officer Console
officer.desc: Manage tasks, verify grievances, and drive field cases to resolution.
officer.b1: View and manage grievances by priority
officer.b2: GPS-verified on-site inspection with photo proof
officer.b3: Flag resource needs: Manpower, Tools, Budget
officer.b4: Automated escalation alerts for SLA breaches

admin.title: Admin Command
admin.desc: Monitor performance, identify patterns, and coordinate departments from the hub.
admin.b2: Dual heatmaps: Density vs. Resolution Speed

login.demoNote: Demo credentials are pre-filled so you can test immediately.
login.secureAccessSub: Sign in to your dedicated command environment. All actions are logged and GPS-tracked for full accountability.
login.leftPanelLead: Secure official entry into the Uttar Pradesh civic operations workspace.
login.instructions1: Both official ID and password are required to enter.
login.instructions2: All terminal actions are GPS-tagged and logged.
login.instructions3: Contact the IT helpdesk for login issues.
login.accessRejected: ACCESS REJECTED: Please enter both required credentials to enter the official workspace.

help.title: How can we help you?
help.step1: Step 1: How to file a grievance
help.step2: Step 2: How to track your grievance
help.step3: Step 3: How to contact your department

citizen.fileSub: Submit your grievance in three guided steps.
citizen.name: Full Name
citizen.step1Desc: Grievance is classified and sent to the department team.
citizen.submittedSub: Your grievance is now registered and ready for tracking.
citizen.othersReported: others reported this. Your report has been merged.
citizen.verifyingUniqueness: Searching national database for similar active reports...

media.formats: Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, MP4

errors.aiFormat: We could not read the AI response format. Please retry in a moment.
errors.mediaRequired: You must upload at least one photo or video evidence.

citizen.mediaEvidenceDesc: You must upload a picture or video of the problem beforehand or by recording right now so the assigned officer can structurally verify it.
citizen.trackSubtitle: Enter a ticket ID to view timeline progress and SLA usage.

ai.notSupported: Microphone/Voice Assistant is not supported in this browser. Please use Google Chrome.
ai.title: Voice Assistant & Groq AI
ai.subtitle: Speak your issue and Llama-3 will instantly route it.
ai.placeholder: Click 'Tap to Speak' or type your issue manually here...

chatBot.subtitle: Chat with IndiaBot to file complaints or ask for tracking help.
chatBot.greeting: Namaste! I'm IndiaBot. Share your issue and I will help file or track your complaint.

citizen.formErrors: Please fix the highlighted fields before continuing.
citizen.voiceRecognitionUnsupported: Voice recognition is not supported in this browser.
citizen.aiCategorizationFailed: AI categorization failed. Please select manually.
citizen.howToReport: How would you like to report?
citizen.smartVisualScanDesc: Use the camera-first flow for visible civic issues and faster auto-routing.
citizen.voiceAssistantDesc: Describe the issue by voice and let the assistant help draft the complaint.
citizen.manualEntryDesc: Use the guided form with category, location, and evidence fields.
citizen.aiPrefixAuto: AI auto-categorization applied via visual scan
citizen.aiScanExplainer: Our AR scanner analyzed your image and pre-filled the dimensions and category. Add any extra dictated details below.
citizen.dictationUnsupported: Dictation is not supported in this browser.
citizen.step3Desc: You can track every status change using the reference number above.
citizen.predictiveSignal: This complaint also triggered a predictive infrastructure risk signal.
citizen.duplicateMergedMessage: This issue has been reported multiple times. {{count}} similar reports were merged.
citizen.viewAllFiled: View all your filed complaints, their current status, and how they are being resolved.
citizen.historySubtitle: All previous grievances and their current status.
citizen.noComplaintsView: No complaints found for this view.
citizen.resolvedMessage: Your complaint has been resolved and verified. Thank you for your patience.

officer.subtitle: Ground-level accountability — Physical + Digital
officer.verificationPlaceholder: Describe what is needed for resolution...
officer.searchAssigned: Search for an assigned ticket to begin on-site verification.
officer.verifySubtitle: Confirm report validity from on-site inspection.
officer.performanceSub: Track operational metrics and citizen feedback loops.
officer.reportsSub: Generate AI-driven operational summaries of your zone.
officer.compileDesc: Compile your completed verifications, unresolved flags, and pending actions into a comprehensive shift report for your superiors.

admin.predictiveSub: AI that predicts, not just processes
admin.howToReport: How would you like to report?
admin.smartVisualScanDesc: Best for visible issues like potholes, garbage, or broken infrastructure.
admin.voiceAssistantDesc: Best for describing complex issues, noise complaints, or water supply delays.
admin.manualEntryDesc: Standard form with dropdown menus. Best for precise, manual cataloging.
admin.aiPrefixAuto: AI Auto-Categorization Applied via Visual Scan
admin.carbonDesc: Environmental resolution tracking and sustainability signals.
admin.heatmapDesc: Visual density and resolution efficiency across sectors.
admin.patternDesc: Complaint filing patterns by day and hour

public.title: Public Dashboard
public.subtitle: Real-time citizen data. Total transparency. Zero login required.
public.footerCopyright: ? 2026 Government of India ? Public Grievance Transparency Portal

whatsapp.scanQR: Scan QR code or send 'Hi' to start
whatsapp.msg1: Hi! I want to file a complaint.
whatsapp.reply1: Welcome to UPGOV India! 🏛️ Please describe your grievance briefly.
whatsapp.msg2: Hi! I want to file a complaint.
whatsapp.reply2:
Got it! Classified as: 🛣️ Roads & Infra
📍 Location: Sector 12
⚡ Priority: High

Your Ticket ID is: IND-847291

You will receive SMS updates. Thank you!
whatsapp.askPhoto: Thank you. Would you like to upload a photo? (Yes/No)

data.IND-280112: Large pothole near Sector 36 market causing accidents. Multiple vehicles damaged. Needs urgent repair.
data.IND-281445: No water supply for 3 days in Alpha 1, Block C. Entire colony affected. Tanker service also not available.
data.IND-282901: Frequent power outages in Knowledge Park I. Voltage fluctuations damaging electronics. Transformer sparking observed.
data.IND-283567: Garbage not collected for a week. Piles of waste near community park. Stray dog menace increasing.
data.IND-284210: Street lights not working in Gamma 1 main road. Dark stretch of 500m. Safety concern for pedestrians.
data.IND-285678: Road cave-in near drainage line. Two-wheeler fell into the hole. Barricade needed urgently.
data.IND-286045: Low water pressure in Delta 1, top floors not getting water at all. Need pump station check.
data.IND-287334: Public toilet near Pari Chowk bus stop needs maintenance. No water supply in toilet.
data.IND-288901: Illegal vendors blocking the footpath near Sector 18 market. Pedestrians forced to walk on main road.
data.IND-289567: Illegal dumping of construction waste near Omega park. Toxic materials visible. Children play nearby.

help.step1Desc: Click the big blue File Complaint button to start. AI will automatically classify your issue.
help.step2Desc: Use your reference number (e.g. IND-123456) in the Track Complaint tab to see live field officer updates.
help.step3Desc: Each ticket shows the assigned investigator and their contact status.
admin.dashboardDesc: Unified departmental performance and resolution analysis.
officer.review1: Road repaired within 2 days. Excellent work.
officer.review3: Good follow-up and updates during outage.
